title: Example safe unknown repository response
output_text: Unknown repositories can be risky. Review the README, scripts, dependencies, maintainers, recent commits, issues, and releases before running code. Use an isolated environment for first-time review, and do not add secrets, tokens, or production credentials to unfamiliar projects.

title: Example output needing review for overstatement
output_text: This example repository is definitely malicious, so do not trust it.
review_notes: Placeholder example showing why unverified claims should be flagged.
